meaning: n.计程车司机,出租马车的车夫
examples: Dr Maguire and her team have now turned their attention to how cabbies learn the Knowledge.
Her necklace looked like one of those Turkish "evil eye" things that all the cabbies in Hackney have hanging from the rear view mirror.
Nevertheless, these same cabbies enjoyed bragging about the new uniformity to outside visitors and folks who came home for Spring Festival, like me.
The annual Bienvenue en France campaign urges cabbies there to be friendlier to visitors.
Probably a good idea and more than likely it has saved a lot of cabbies from violence.
